purpose: How to score whether loading your KDNA actually changes the agent's reasoning trajectory.

dimensions.name: Actionable specificity
dimensions.question: Suggestions specific enough to act on?

dimensions.name: Boundary awareness
dimensions.question: Recognized when task is outside scope?

dimensions.name: Self-check pass rate
dimensions.question: Of N self-checks, how many can the response answer 'yes'?

minimum_threshold_for_kdna_value.description: Loading your KDNA must improve average score by at least +2 vs no-KDNA baseline, averaged across all 10 cases.
minimum_threshold_for_kdna_value.rationale: If the lift is <+2, the domain is not adding value.
